videoSnippet.title: Play Like You Never Want the Game to End || Fabi vs Wesley So || The American Cup 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/
https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments

Caruana, Fabiano (2795) - So, Wesley (2753)
The American Cup 2026 (Chess.com) [03-01] 2026.03.06
C65 Ruy Lopez, Berlin defence

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bb5 Nf6 4.d3 Bc5 5.Nc3 d6 6.Bg5 h6 7.Bh4 O-O 8.Qd2 Bb4 9.a3 Bxc3 10.Qxc3 Ne7 11.Bxf6 gxf6 12.d4 c6 13.Be2 f5 14.exf5 e4 15.Nd2 Bxf5 16.Qg3+ Kh7 17.Nc4 d5 18.Ne3 Rg8 19.Qf4 Be6 20.Bh5 Rg5 21.g4 Qb8 22.Qxb8 Rxb8 23.f4 exf3 24.Kf2 Rg7 25.h4 Nc8 26.g5 Nd6 27.Bxf3 f6 28.gxh6 Kxh6 29.Rag1 Rxg1 30.Rxg1 Rf8 31.Re1 Bf5 32.Kg3 Re8 33.Kf4 Be4 34.Bd1 Rg8 35.c3 a5 36.a4 b6 37.Bg4 Rg7 38.Be2 Rg6 39.b3 Rg8 40.c4 Re8 41.Bg4 f5 42.Be2 dxc4 43.bxc4 Rd8 44.Rd1 Re8 45.Rd2 Kg6 46.Nf1 Kf6 47.Ng3 Nc8 48.h5 Rd8 49.Nxe4+ fxe4 50.Kxe4 Kg5 51.Rd1 Re8+ 52.Kd3 c5 53.Rg1+ Kf4 54.Rg4+ Kf5 55.Rg6 cxd4 56.Bg4+ Ke5 57.Bxc8 Rxc8 58.Rxb6
